title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 81.
content:
There was an Old Man of the East,
    Who gave all his children a feast;
    But they all ate so much,
    And their conduct was such,
    That it killed that Old Man of the East.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 81."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
